text_fr: 1510  (XV).  Manifestations de haine entre races ou nationalites
text_en: 1510 (XV). Manifestations of hatred between races or nationalites

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant que  les  buts  fondamentaux  pes  Nations Unies  soot  de  maintenir  la paix et la  securite  interna·· donates  et  de  developper  entre  les  nations  des  relations amicales  et  qu'il est  necessaire, a cette  fin,  de  renforcer la  cooperation  entre  les  peuples  et  les  nations  et  d'edu› quer  la  jeune generation clans  cet  esprit,
text_en: Recalling that the fundamental purposes of the United Nations are to maintain international peace and security and to develop friendly relations among nations and that, for this purpose, it is necessary to strengthen cooperation between peoples and nations and to strengthen the young generation in this spirit,

text_fr: N otant  avec  satisfaction que  les  manifestations  de haine entre races ou nationalites, d'intolerance religieuse et  de  prejuges  raciaux  qui  se  produisent  encore  clans le  monde  ont  toujours  ete  condarnnees  par  !'Organi› sation  des  Nations  Unies,
text_en: Noting with satisfaction that the manifestations of hatred between races or nationalites, religious intolerance and racial prejudice that still occur in the world have always been condensed by the United Nations,

text_fr: Partageant la  profonde inquietude que  ces  manifesta› tions  inspirent a la  Commission  des  droits  de  l'homme et a la  Sous-Commission  de  la  lutte  contre  les  mesures discriminatoires  et  de  la  protection  des  minorites,
text_en: Sharing the deep concern that these demonstrations inspire the Commission on Human Rights and the Sub-Commission on Prevention of Discrimination and Protection of Minorities,

text_fr: S' alarmant du fait  que  les  tendances a la  haine  entre races  ou  nationalites  ne  soot  pas  encore  suffisamment combattues  clans  de  nombreuses  regions  du  monde  par une orientation  de  la  jeunesse  conforme a !'esprit de  la Charte  des  Nations  Unies,
text_en: Worrying that tendencies have hatred between races or nationalites still not sufficiently combated clans from many regions of the world by a youth orientation in accordance with the spirit of the Charter of the United Nations,

text_fr: Enon,ant le  principe selon  lequel  les  Nations  Unies ont le  devoir  de  combattre  ces  manifestations,  d'etablir Jes  faits  et les  causes  de leur origine, et de  recommander des  mesures  energiques  et  efficaces  qui  puissent  etre prises a leur  encontre,
text_en: Bearing in mind the principle that the United Nations has a duty to combat these manifestations, to establish Jes fait and the causes of their origin, and to recommend energetic and effective measures that can be taken against them,

items_fr: 1. Condamne resolument toutes  les  manifestations  et tous  les  actes  de  haine  entre races,  religions  ou  nationa› lites  dans  les  domaines  politique,  economique,  social, educatif  et  culture!  de  l\_a  vie  de  la  societe  en  tant que violations  de  la  Charte  des  Nations  Unies  et  de  la Declaration universelle  des  droits  de  l'homme;
2. Invite les gouvernements  de  tous  les  Etats a prendre toutes mesures necessaires pour empecher toutes les  manifestations  de  haine  entre  races,  religions  ou nationalites.
items_en: 1. Resolutely condemns all manifestations and acts of hatred between races, religions or nations in the political, economic, social, educational and cultural fields! of the life of society as violations of the Charter of the United Nations and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights;
2. Invites the Governments of all States to take all necessary measures to prevent all manifestations of hatred between races, religions or nationalites.

text_fr: 943eme seance  plenierc,
text_en: 943rd plenary session,

text_fr: 12 decembre  1960.
text_en: 12 December 1960.

text_fr: 1511  (XV).  Enseignement des buts et des  prin› cipes, de la structure et des activites de }'Or› ganisation des  Nations  Unies  et des  institu› tions qui Jui sont reliees
text_en: 1511 (XV). Teaching the aims and principles, structure and activities of the Organization of the United Nations and the institutions which Jui are linked

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Rappelant sa  resolution  137  (II)  du  17  novembre 1947, par laquelle elle a recommande aux gouvernements de  tous  les  Etats  Membres  de  prendre  des  mesures tendant a encourager l'enseigriement, dans Jes  ecoles,  des buts  et  des  principes,  de  la  structure  et  des  activites de !'Organisations des  Nations Unies,
text_en: Recalling its Resolution 137 (II) of 17 November 1947, in which it recommended that the Governments of all Member States take measures to encourage the teaching in Jes écoles of the purposes and principles, structure and activities of the United Nations,

text_fr: N otant les decisions  que  le  Conseil  economique  et social  a  prises  depuis  !ors  pour  favoriser  la  realisation de  cette  fin,
text_en: In addition to the decisions taken by the Economic and Social Council since then to promote the achievement of this end,

text_fr: Notant  en  particulier la  resolution  748  (XXIX)  dn Conseil economique et social, en date du 6 avril  1960,
text_en: Noting in particular Economic and Social Council Resolution 748 (XXIX) of 6 April 1960,

items_fr: 1. Exprime  l'avis que  l'enseignement relatif a !'Or› ganisation  des  Nations Unies et aux institutions  qui  lui soot reliees  est  un  important moyen  d'accroitre l'interet porte a leurs  travaux et l'appui qui  leur est  fourni ;

2. E.xprime  en  outre  l'avis que  la  connaissance  et !'intelligence des  buts  et  des  activites  de  !'Organisation des Nations Unies et des  institutions qui  lui  soot  reliees contribuent a entretenir  chez  les  jeunes  les  idees  de
items_en: 1. Expresses the opinion that the teaching relating to the organization of the United Nations and to the institutions connected with it is an important means of increasing the interest to their work and the support provided to them;

2. E.xprime also the opinion that knowledge and intelligence of the aims and activities of the United Nations and of the institutions connected with it contribute to maintaining among young people the ideas of

text_fr: paix  et  de  cooperation  internationales  et  doivent  done etre  developpees  aussi  largement  que  possible;
text_en: international peace and cooperation and must be developed as widely as possible;

items_fr: 3. Approuve les  mesures  prises  par  le  Conseil  eco› nomique  et  social  pour  favoriser  !'application  de  la recommandation  contenue  dans  la  resolution  137  (II) de  I' Assemblee  generate;

4. Remercie !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  pour !'education, la  science  et  la  culture  et  les  autres  insti› tutions  specialisees,  ainsi  que  Jes organisations  non gouvernementales,  de  la  cooperation  dont  elles  ont  fait preuve  clans  la  propagation de  l'i<lee des  Nations  Unies;

5. Prie instamment tous  les  interesses  de  poursuivre leurs  efforts  pour  encourager  dans  Jes  ecoles  primaires et  secondaires,  ainsi  que  dans  les  facultes  des  sciences sociales  et  humaines  et  clans  les  centres  d'education par Jes methodes  audio-visuelles,  l'enseignement  des  buts et  des  principes,  de  la  structure et  des  activites  de  !'Or› ganisation  des  Nations  Unies  et  des  institutions  qui  Jui sont reliees ;

6. Invite !'Organisation des  Nations Unies pour !'edu› cation,  la  science  et  la  culture a preter  son  concours, avec la cooperation de  !'Organisation des  Nations Unies, en  preparant  du  materiel  de  base  susceptible  d'etre utilise a ces  fins.
items_en: 3. Approves the measures taken by the Economic and Social Council to promote the implementation of the recommendation contained in Resolution 137 (II) of the General Assembly;

4. Expresses its appreciation to the United Nations for its education, science and culture and other specialized institutions, as well as to the non-governmental organizations, for their cooperation in the spread of the United Nations;

5. Urges all interested persons to continue their efforts to encourage in Jes écoles primaires et soins, as well as in the faculties of the social and human sciences and the centres of education by Jes méthodes audiovisuels, the teaching of the aims and principles, structure and activities of !'Or› organization of the United Nations and the institutions that Jui are linked;

6. Invites the United Nations Organization for !'edu› cation, science and culture to assist, with the cooperation of the United Nations, in the preparation of the basic material likely to be used for these purposes.

text_fr: 943eme seance  plenierc,
text_en: 943rd plenary session,

text_fr: 12  decembre  1960.
text_en: 12 December 1960.

text_fr: 1512  (XV).  Tendances  principales  de  la  re› cherche dans le domaine des sciences ex.acles et  naturelles,  diffusion  des  connaissances scientifiques  et  leur  application a des  fins pacifiques
text_en: 1512 (XV). Main trends in research in the field of exacle and natural sciences, dissemination of scientific knowledge and its application for peaceful purposes

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: C onsiderant que  Jes  sciences  exactes  et  naturelles  en general  continuent a favoriser  le  progres  economique et  social  de  l'humanite,
text_en: In view of the fact that Is the natural and exact sciences in general continue to promote the economic and social progress of humanity,

text_fr: Ayant  re,u l'etude sur  Jes  tendances  principales  de la  recherche  clans  le  domaine  des  sciences  exactes  et naturelles,  la  diffusion  des  connaissances  scientifiques et  leur  application a des  fins  pacifiques 11 ,
text_en: Having received the study on the main trends in research in the field of the exact and natural sciences, the dissemination of scientific knowledge and its application for peaceful purposes 11 ,

text_fr: Prenant  note de  la  resolution  804  B  (XXX)  du Conseil  economique  et  social.  en  date  du  3  aout  1960. clans  laquelle  le  Conseil  demande  qu'une large  diffusion de  l'etude  soit  assuree  et  que  !'on  recueille  Jes  obser› vations  des gouvernements  des  Etats  Membres,  des institutions  specialisees  competentes  et  de  l' Agencc  internationale  de  l'energie atomique, -
text_en: Taking note of Economic and Social Council Resolution 804 B (XXX) of 3 August 1960, in which the Council called for a wide dissemination of the study and for the collection of data from the governments of the Member States, specialized institutions and the International Atomic Energy Agency,

items_fr: 1. Appuie la  decision  . du  Conseil economique  et social  de  proceder,  Iors  de  sa  trente-deuxieme  session, a un  examen  detaille  de  l'etude en  tenant  compte  de !'opinion que  pourra exprimer a ce  sujet la  Conference generale  de  !'Organisation  des Nations  Unies  pour ]'education,  la  science  et  la  culture;

2. Recommande aux gouvernements des  Etats Mem› bres,  aux  institutions  reliees a !'Organisation  et  aux organisations  non  gouvernementales  competentes  de donner a l'etude la  plus  large  publicite  possible;

3. Prie le  Conseil  economique  et  social,  compte  tenu des  observations  recueillies  par le  Secretaire  general  en execution  de  la  resolution  804  B  (XXX)  du  Conseil et  de  la  discussion  consacree a cette  question  ]ors  de  la quinzieme session  de  I' Assemblee  generale,  de  presenter un  nouveau  rapport a ce  sujet a I' Assemblee  generale lors  de  sa  seizieme  session  et  de  Jui  recommander  des mesures  concretes  concernant  notamment:

a) La possibilite  d'utiliser  i  des  fins  pacifiques  Jes realisations  actuelles  des  sciences  exactes  et  naturelles pour favoriser  le  progres economique  et  le  bien-etre  de l'humanite,  et  specialement  pour  accelerer  le  progres economique  et  social  des  pays  peu  developpes;

b) La  possibilite  d'elargir  la cooperation  interna› tionale  en  ce  qui concerne l'echange des  renseignements scientifiques et des connaissances  acquises  clans le domaine  des  sciences  exactes  et  naturelles.
items_en: 1. Supports the decision of the Economic and Social Council to proceed, at its thirty-second session, to a detailed examination of the study taking into account the views of the General Conference of the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization on this subject;
2. Recommends that the governments of the Member States, the institutions linked to the Organization and the competent non-governmental organizations give the widest possible publicity;

3. Requests the Economic and Social Council, taking into account the comments received by the Secretary-General in the implementation of Council Resolution 804 B (XXX) and the discussion on this issue at the fifty-fifth session of the General Assembly, to submit a further report thereon to the General Assembly at its sixteenth session and to recommend concrete measures, inter alia:

(a) The possibility of using current peaceful uses of accurate and natural sciences to promote the economic progress and well-being of mankind, and especially to accelerate the economic and social progress of less developed countries;
(b) The possibility of expanding international cooperation in the exchange of scientific information and knowledge in the field of accurate and natural sciences.

text_fr: 12 decembre 1960.
text_en: 12 December 1960.

text_fr: 1570  (XV).  Projet de declara1ion sur la liberte de l'informntion
text_en: 1570 (XV). Draft declaration on freedom of information

text_fr: L'Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: N'ayant pas  ete en  mesure d'examiner i  sa quinzie:11e session  le  projet de declaration  sur  la  liberte  de  !'infor› mation  transmis  par  la  resolution  756  (XXIX)  du Conseil  economique  et  social,  en  date  du  21  avril  1960.
text_en: Having not been able to consider at its fifty-first session the draft declaration on freedom of information transmitted by Economic and Social Council Resolution 756 (XXIX) of 21 April 1960.

text_fr: Decide d'examiner  ce  projet  de  declaration  i sa seizieme  session.
text_en: Decides to consider this draft declaration at its sixteenth session.

text_fr: 954eme  seance  pleniere, 18 decembre  196{)\_
text_en: 954th plenary session, 18 December 196{)\_

text_fr: 1571  (XV).  Projet de declaration sur le droit d'asile
text_en: 1571 (XV). Draft declaration on the right of asylum

text_fr: L' Assemblee gcnerale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: N'ayant pas  ete  en  mcsure d'examiner i  sa quinzieme session  le  projet  de  declaration  sur le droit  d'asile,
text_en: Having not been able to consider the draft declaration on the right of asylum at its fifth session,

text_fr: Decide d'etudier cette:  question  le  plus  tot  possible lors  de  sa  seizieme  session  et  de  consacrer,  au  cours de  ladite  session,  le  plus  grand  nombre  possible  de seances a l'examen du  projet de declaration  sur le  droit d'asile.
text_en: Decides to study this question as early as possible at its sixteenth session and to devote as many meetings as possible to the consideration of the draft declaration on the right of asylum at that session.

text_fr: 954emc  seanCP  pleniere, 18 decembre  1960.
text_en: 954emc seanCP pleniere, 18 December 1960.

text_fr: 1572  (XV).  Mesures  destinees a promouvoir parmi les jeunes Jes  ideaux de paix, de res› pect mutuel et de comprehension  entre les peuples
text_en: 1572 (XV). Measures to promote among young people the ideals of peace, mutual peace and understanding among peoples

text_fr: L' Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Convaincue que, pour atteindre le  but de la Charte des Nations  Unies  consistant a preserver  les  generations futures  du  fleau  de  la  guerre,  ii  est  important et  urgent d'elever la  jeune generation  d'aujourd'hui clans  !'esprit de  paix,  de  respect  mutuel  et  de  comprehension  entre les  peuples,
text_en: Convinced that, in order to achieve the purpose of the Charter of the United Nations of preserving the future generations of the fleau of war, it is important and urgent to raise the young generation of today's clans!' spirit of peace, mutual respect and understanding among peoples,

text_fr: Reaffirmant le  principe  inscrit  dans  la  Declaration universelle  des  droits  de  l'homme et  la  Declaration  des droits  de  l'enfant, ainsi  que  dans  !'article 14  du  projet cle pacte  relatif  aux  droits  economiques,  sociaux  et ·culturels, selon  lequel  Jes  jeunes <loivent  etre eleves  dans un  esprit  de  paix,  de  comprehension,  de  tolerance  et d'amitie  entre  Jes  nations,
text_en: Reaffirming the principle enshrined in the Universal Declaration of Human Rights and the Declaration of the Rights of the Child, as well as in Article 14 of the draft Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights, according to which Jes jes jes jeunes are raised in a spirit of peace, understanding, tolerance and friendship between Jes nations,

text_fr: Constatant  avec  inquietude que  !'education  de la jeunesse dans diverses parties du monde n'a pas encore ete orientee vers la  realisation  de ces  fins,
text_en: Noting with concern that youth education in various parts of the world has not yet been directed towards the realization of these ends,

text_fr: Estimant que  les  echanges  libres  et  sans  restriction, par tous les  moyens,  entre Jes  jeunes de differents pays, d'idees et  d'opinions de nature a promouvoir les  ideaux de  paix,  de  respect  mutuel  et  de  comprehension  entre Jes  peuples contribueront au  raffermissement  de  la  con› fiance  internationale  et  i !'amelioration  des  relations entre  Etats,
text_en: Considering that the free and unrestricted exchanges, by all means, between young people from different countries, ideas and opinions of a nature to promote the ideals of peace, mutual respect and understanding between peoples will contribute to the strengthening of international trust and the improvement of relations between States,

text_fr: Rappelant la  resolution  1397  (XIV)  de  l'Assemblee generale,  en date du  20 novembre  1959,  et  la  resolution 803  (XXX)  du  Conseil  economique  et  social,  en  date du 3 aout 1960, par laquelle le  Conseil  invite notamment !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  pour  !'education,  la science  et  la culture a etudier la  possibilite  de  formulcr des  principes  en  vue  de  guider  !'action bilaterale,  re› gionale  et  internationale  touchant  Jes  relations  et  Jes echanges  clans  Jes domaines  de  l'education  et  de  la culture,
text_en: Recalling Economic and Social Council Resolution 1397 (XIV) of 20 November 1959, and Economic and Social Council Resolution 803 (XXX) of 3 August 1960, by which the Council invited, inter alia, the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization to consider the possibility of formulating principles for guiding the bilateral, regional and international action concerning Is relations and Jes exchanges clans Is areas of education and culture,

items_fr: l. Recommande aux  Etats,  aux  organisations  non gouvernementales  et  aux  individus  de  prendre  des mesures  efficaces  afin  de  promouvoir  parmi  les  jeunes Jes  ideaux de paix, de respect  mutuel  et  de  comprehen› sion  entre  les  peuples ;

2. Invite  egalement les  Etats,  les  organisations  non gouvernementales  et  les  individus a encourager  les echanges  libres  et  sans  restriction,  par tous  Jes  moyens, entre  Jes  jeunes  de  differents  pays,  d'idees et  d'opinions de  nature  i  favoriser  les  ideaux  de  paix,  de  respect mutuel  et  de  comprehension  entre les  peuples ;

3. Invite les  institutions  specialisees  competentes,  et surtout  !'Organisation  des  Nations  Unies  pour  !'edu› cation,  la  science  et  la  culture,  a examiner  Jes  moyens propres a intensifier  !'action  internationale,  nationale et  benevole  dans  ce  domaine,  y  compris  la  possibilite d'elaborer  un  projet  de  declaration  internationale  qui proclamerait  Jes  principes  fondamentaux  concernant  la promotion  parmi  les  jeunes  des  ideaux  de  paix,  de respect  mutuel  et  de  comprehension  entre  les  peuples, et a faire  rapport a ce  sujet  au  Conseil  economique  et social,  si  possible  lors  de  sa trente-deuxieme  session;

4. Prie le Conseil  economique  et  social,  lorsqu'il soumettra a I' Assemblee  generale  ses  recommandations relatives a ces  rapports,  de  tenir  compte  des  opinions exprimees par les  Etats Membres, !ors de  la  quinzieme session  de  l'Assemblee, au  sujet  de la  necessite  de  pro› mouvoir parmi  Jes  jeunes Jes  ideaux de paix,  de respect mutuel  et de  comprehension  entre les  peuples;

5. Prie  en  outre le Conseil  economique  et  social, lorsqu'il  soumettra a I' Assemblee  generale  ses  obser› vations  sur  le  prochain  rapport  que  !'Organisation des Nations  Unies  pour !'education, la  science  et la culture a  ete  invitee a presenter  aux  termes  de  la  resolution 803  (XXX)  du Conseil,  de  tenir compte  de  la  prcsente resolution  et  des  debats  consacres a cette  question.
items_en: l. Recommends that States, non-governmental organizations and individuals take effective measures to promote among young people the ideals of peace, mutual respect and understanding among peoples;

2. Also invites States, non-governmental organizations and individuals to encourage free and unrestricted exchanges, by all means, between young people from different countries, ideas and opinions of a nature that fosters the ideals of peace, mutual respect and understanding among peoples;

3. Invites the competent specialized institutions, and above all!'United Nations Organization for the Development, Science and Culture, to consider its own means of intensifying international, national and benevolent action in this field, including the possibility of drawing up a draft international declaration which would proclaim my fundamental principles concerning the promotion among young people of the ideals of peace, mutual respect and understanding among peoples, and to report thereon to the Economic and Social Council, if possible at its thirty-second session;

4. Requests the Economic and Social Council, when submitting its recommendations on these reports to the General Assembly, to take into account the views expressed by the Member States at the fifty-fifth session of the Assembly on the need to promote peace, mutual respect and understanding among young people;

5. Further requests the Economic and Social Council, when submitting its comments to the General Assembly on the next report which the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization has been invited to submit pursuant to Council Resolution 803 (XXX), to take into account the present resolution and the debates devoted to this issue.

text_fr: 954eme  seance  plcnierc, 18  dcce-mbre  1960.
text_en: 954th meeting plcnierc, 18 dc-mber 1960.
